The '''Corellian heavy lifter''' was a transport [[Starship/Legends|vessel]] designed by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] to haul cargo.

==Characteristics==
It was roughly based around the shape of a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]], which had its central section modified to make room for two heavy-duty clamps, which could grab and hold large cargo-modules for transport to battlefields.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' {{1st}}
